name: X-Golf Coralville
about: X-Golf Coralville offers a golf simulation experience with a focus on technology and convenience. The venue provides bays for virtual golf play and practice. Pricing is structured by the hour per bay, making it accessible for individual sessions. The atmosphere is designed for both casual players and those looking to improve their game with simulator technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for realistic play
Flexible pricing model for various session lengths
Private rooms available for focused practice or events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers its own bar and kitchen services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Coralville kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and welcomes families with children.
